name: Before We Get Married
overview: Young girl Nhat Phuong is faced with the choice of continuing to get married with her boyfriend of 3 years or entering into a hot relationship with a handsome new guy.

trailers.title: [Trailer]: Yêu Trước Ngày Cưới - Tình yêu thanh xuân liệu có bằng vài giây rung động?
